subcodes.first_line: ...Since the orderly running of your association dependeth upon the devotion, integrity, fair-mindedness and sanctity of purpose manifested by the friends of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: چون انتظام آن دائره موکول به همت و عفت و عدالت و عصمت احبای الهیست
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @excellence; distinction, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
